examples: Part of that responsibility is making sure that we honor our commitments to those who have served our country with such valor.
Nobody starts a software project planning to fail, but discretion truly is the better part of valor if things start coming apart.
This is a kid who left me awed and biting my lip; this isn't a tale of victimization but of valor, empowerment and uncommon heroism.
On Wednesday night, the valor of the volunteers was put to the ultimate test.
As my father used to say, though, discretion is the better part of valor.
